How women's T20s got bigger, faster and bolder
description: On the eve of the Women's T20 World Cup, a deep dive into how women's cricket quietly underwent its own batting revolution. From Charlotte Edwards and Suzie Bates to Beth Mooney, Hayley Matthews and Shafali Verma, the game has shifted from preserving wickets to exploiting powerplays. Run rates among elite nations are up 27%, boundaries have surged and franchise leagues have changed batting habits, making 150 the new benchmark.

Jaishankar exposes EU double-standard: The weapons Pakistan got from Europe
description: S Jaishankar, the External Affairs Minister of India, has expressed his frustration with what he perceives as Europe's double standards regarding energy dealings with Russia. He noted that European nations, while admonishing India, have a troubling record of arming countries that have actively threatened India, notably strengthening Pakistan’s defense for decades.

Google donates $50mn to train 300K workers, CEO says infrastructure is key
description: Google is investing $50 million through Google.org to train 300,000 American workers for skilled trade jobs like electricians, welders, and plumbers. This initiative aims to bolster the nation's digital economy by supporting the physical infrastructure built and maintained by these essential workers. The funding will empower various labor unions and trade associations across more than 20 states.
